name: self-healing-infrastructure
description: MEOK AI Labs — Self-Healing Infrastructure. 9-node cluster health, GPU orchestration, cost optimization, auto-remediation.

tools.name: node_health_check
tools.description: Check health of infrastructure nodes including CPU, memory, disk, and GPU.

tools.name: cluster_health_check
tools.description: Check health of all 9 nodes in the cluster.

tools.name: restart_service
tools.description: Restart a failed service with automatic rollback on repeated failures.

tools.name: cost_report
tools.description: Generate infrastructure cost report with breakdown by service, region, and resource.

tools.name: auto_remediate
tools.description: Automatically remediate common infrastructure issues using predefined playbooks.

tools.name: gpu_orchestration
tools.description: Orchestrate GPU allocation across the 9-node cluster.

tools.name: failover_decision
tools.description: Determine failover action for a failed node in the cluster.
